title: Super Mario Bros. 3 Glitched Up World 1
description:
I was playing around with random SMB3 game genie codes that I found from a website when I found this one code. I thought it looked pretty cool in relation to corrupting so I decided to record this.

This code causes the game to go completely haywire. There are many unpredictable occurrences such as donut blocks trailing Mario wherever he goes, atrocious music occurring at some point, jerky scrolling, falling through solid ground, and many more. I had to reset the game numerous times due to peeving freezes, which made me grunt every time it happens. The sound effects are annoying as well because of the random high pitch noises. Watch as I try to make random attempts.

Note: Constant volume changing can get annoying too. Maybe because of youtube's audio quality?
